onboarding.pickHowToRun: pick how u want me to run bb
onboarding.cloudDescription: i run on eliza cloud. easiest setup, always on, can still use ur browser & computer if u let me
onboarding.localSandboxDescription: i run on ur machine in a secure container. ur api keys stay hidden even from me. needs docker
onboarding.localRawDescription: i run directly on ur machine w full access. fastest & simplest but no sandbox protection
onboarding.oneLoginWallets: Sign in with Privy. Wallets are set up automatically.
onboarding.youAreIn: You're in. Taking you to the next step...
onboarding.choosePath: Choose your path — you can always change settings later.
onboarding.quickSetupHint: Recommended — pick your AI provider and go.
onboarding.fullSetupHint: Configure run mode, wallets, connectors, and more.
onboarding.ownerQuestion: and what should i call u?
onboarding.optionalOwnerHint: optional — skip if you don't mind being called anon
onboarding.avatarQuestion: what body should i, uhhh, use?
onboarding.mobileCloudDescription: since ur on mobile i'll run on eliza cloud. i can still do everything — browse the web, manage ur stuff, and more
onboarding.mobileCloudBadgeHint: always on, works from any device, easiest setup
onboarding.walletQuestion: soooo can i have a wallet?
onboarding.optionalWalletHint: optional — you can skip this and set it up later
onboarding.walletProvisionHint: In Pure Privy mode, I create managed wallets automatically after Privy login: ETH/Base/BSC + Solana.
onboarding.connectorsQuestion: how do you want to reach me?
onboarding.optionalConnectorsHint: optional — skip this if you just want to use the web app for now
onboarding.optionalPermissionsHint: optional — you can adjust these any time in settings

settings.privateKeysWarning: Warning: Private keys give full access to your wallets. Never share them and store them securely.
settings.resetAgentHint: Wipe all config, memory, and data. Returns to the onboarding wizard.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings and data? This cannot be undone and you will return to onboarding.
settings.exportAgentHint: Your character, memories, chats, secrets, and relationships will be downloaded as a single file. Exports are encrypted and require a password.
settings.exportContainsCount: Contains {{memories}} memories, {{entities}} entities, {{rooms}} rooms, {{worlds}} worlds, {{tasks}} tasks.
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters.
settings.importAgentHint: Select an .eliza-agent export file and enter the password used during export.
advanced.runtimeDesc: Deep runtime object introspection and load order
permissions.grantToUnlock: Grant permissions to unlock full capabilities
permissions.accessibilityDesc: Control mouse, keyboard, and interact with other applications
permissions.screenRecordingDesc: Capture screen content for screenshots and vision
permissions.microphoneDesc: Voice input for talk mode and speech recognition
permissions.cameraDesc: Video input for vision and video capture
permissions.computerUseDesc: Full desktop control with mouse and keyboard
permissions.openSettingsDesktopOnly: Open Settings works in Milady Desktop only. In browser/cloud mode, open OS settings manually.
permissions.unableLoadPermissions: Unable to load permissions. This feature requires Electron.
permissions.desktopOnlyHint: Desktop mode only. "Settings" opens system settings in Milady Desktop.
permissions.macosHint: macOS requires Accessibility permission for computer control. Open System Settings > Privacy & Security.
permissions.genericHint: Grant permissions to enable features like voice input and computer control.
permissions.automationHint: Choose what the agent can change by itself.
permissions.tradeHint: Independent safety layer for BSC trade execution.
permissions.trade.userSignDesc: No server-side execution. Wallet signature required.
permissions.trade.manualDesc: UI-triggered execution allowed; agent execution blocked.
permissions.trade.agentDesc: Agent is allowed to execute trades with local-key mode.
permissions.productionDefaults: One-click production defaults for public deployment.
permissions.capabilitiesHint: Capabilities require their underlying system permissions. Enable capabilities to unlock agent features.
permissions.unableCheck: Unable to check permissions. You can configure them later in Settings.
permissions.changeLater: You can change these settings later in Settings → Permissions
permissions.automationModeSetFull: Agent automation mode set to Full.
permissions.automationModeSetConnectors: Agent automation mode set to Connectors only.
permissions.tradeModeSetAgent: Trade mode set to Agent auto.
permissions.tradeModeSetManual: Trade mode set to Manual local-key.
permissions.tradeModeSetUser: Trade mode set to User-sign only.
permissions.confirmProductionDefaults:
Apply production wallet defaults?

This will enforce Pure Privy mode, set trade mode to User-sign only, disable local execution, and clear local private keys from runtime/config.
permissions.productionDefaultsApplied: Production defaults applied: Pure Privy + User-sign only.
